findings.summary: The frozen Level-3 contract omits the policy-required explicit hard_gates, routing_diagnostics, control_eligibility, and independent_evidence_requirement fields.
findings.smallest_repair: Add the four explicit policy-v1.0 fields without changing definitions or thresholds, regenerate the contract and dependent hashes, and obtain a new independent pre-outcome review.

findings.summary: The runner does not compare reconstructed timestamp authority with the frozen hash and does not freeze/verify the market manifest and official trade-bar bytes before outcome reads.
findings.smallest_repair: Freeze and preflight the market-manifest and selected official trade-bar content authority, compare timestamp_authority_hash before output/open reads, add a fail-closed test, then refreeze and rereview.

findings.summary: Feature-contract prose says all non-liquidation states use daily medians, while basis_change_15m uses all prior-day observations.
findings.smallest_repair: Correct the prose to match FEATURE_EXTENSION_CONTRACT and _normalize_prior_observations, then regenerate the artifact manifest.
